svg.title: Fourth Meridian Architecture Map
svg.desc: City-map view of 51 tables across six bounded contexts (Identity, External Connections, Financial, Spaces, Marketplace v1 scope, Platform Ops), with relationship roads between districts and per-table badges for security tier, regenerability and the seven-badge lifecycle classification (archive, soft-delete, hard-delete, cascade, retention, AI-accessible, publicly exposable). Includes the proposed ProviderCatalog (Platform Ops, routes user institution choice to a provider adapter) and SpaceTemplate (Marketplace, the installable configuration behind a Framework).
svg.text: Tags: 🔓 plaintext 🔐 app-encrypted #️⃣ hashed 👁️ public 🤖 AI-readable only | ♻ regenerable | * proposed strikethrough = retiring

Lifecycle: 📦 archive 🩹 soft-delete ⛔ hard-delete 🔗 cascade-only ⏳ retention window 🧠 AI Context Builder input 🌐 publicly exposable | badges on proposed tables are recommendations, not yet-built behavior (§7.1)
